====Pokémon====
{{anchor|Bronzor 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|pkmn=Bronzor
|trainer=Mars
|type1=Steel
|type2=Psychic
|img=Mars Bronzor Adventures.png
|epnum=PS343
|epname=Honey for Combee
|desc={{p|Bronzor}} is the first Pokémon seen on Mars's team. It was first used as a guard dog to prevent people from entering the Valley Windworks where it attacked {{adv|Diamond}}, {{adv|Pearl}}, {{adv|Platinum}}, and the Valley Windworks manager's daughter but they managed to escape. Mars later used it to fill the Windworks with sand while she made her escape. Later, it was seen with Mars at Lake Verity and the Spear Pillar where it battled Wake and Gardenia's Pokémon but was eventually defeated. It later battled Cheryl's Blissey and prevented her from healing, but was later crushed by Giratina charging past them.

Bronzor's known moves are {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Sandstorm}}, and {{m|Heal Block}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|pkmn=Zubat
|trainer=Mars
|type1=Poison
|type2=Flying
|img=Mars Zubat Adventures.png
|epnum=PS344
|epname=Belligerent Bronzor
|desc={{p|Zubat}} is the second Pokémon seen on Mars's team. It is mainly used to threaten people with its sharp blade-like wings but is not usually seen in battle. It was first seen holding the Valley Windworks Manager at Knife-point so that he would be forced to work for them. It was later seen holding Johanna hostage with its wings but lost hold of her when she squeezed Berry Juice onto its face. It was last seen battling Crasher Wake and Gardenia's Pokémon but was defeated.

None of Zubat's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Purugly 4}}{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Mars
|gender=female
|pkmn=Purugly
|type1=Normal
|img=Mars Purugly Adventures.png
|epnum=PS344
|epname=Belligerent Bronzor
|desc={{p|Purugly}} is the third Pokémon seen on Mars's team. Despite her large build, Purugly is a powerful battler than can hold her own in battles (although she can comically be seen struggling trying to climb up a small step at one point).}}

{{TrainerPoké
|pkmn=Electivire
|trainer=Mars
|type1=Electric
|img=Mars Electivire Adventures.png
|epnum=PS344
|epname=Belligerent Bronzor
|desc={{p|Electivire}} was used to steal the energy from the Valley Windworks. Later, it was seen transferring the stolen energy to the Galactic Bomb and hasn't been seen since. In the original magazine versions, Electivire was a {{p|Luxray}}.

None of Electivire's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|pkmn=Yanmega
|trainer=Mars
|type1=Bug
|type2=Flying
|img=Mars Yanmega Adventures.png
|epnum=PS394
|epname=Yikes, Yanmega! II
|desc={{p|Yanmega}} is the fourth Pokémon seen on Mars's team. Mars uses it as her mode of aerial transportation and it also proves to be a powerful battler.

Yanmega's known moves are {{m|Slash}}, {{m|U-turn}}, {{m|Bug Buzz}}, and {{m|Bug Bite}}.}}
